commands.evidence: README documents request, full-hit response, partial-miss response, duplicate normalization, and validation behavior

requirements_met.requirement: Provide a batch session TPS endpoint under the existing /api/v1 namespace.
requirements_met.evidence: POST /api/v1/sessions/batch/tps returns SessionTPSResponse-shaped entries inside sessions.
pytest tests/test_api.py -v passed with existing API tests plus batch coverage.
Partial-miss and all-miss tests assert missing_session_ids with 200 responses.
Empty list and non-list session_ids tests return 422; duplicate input is deduplicated.

requirements_met.requirement: Fail cleanly when persistence is unavailable.
requirements_met.evidence: Store None batch endpoint test returns HTTP 503 with Database not available.

requirements_met.requirement: Avoid unnecessary database fan-out where practical.
requirements_met.evidence: Endpoint deduplicates before lookup, bounding calls to unique requested IDs for expected small local batches.
README endpoint table and examples include /api/v1/sessions/batch/tps.
